identity.name: Hodler Inn
identity.tone: Exclusive, Secure, High-Tech, opulent but minimalist.
identity.aesthetic: Dark Luxury (Crypto-Noir). Deep blacks, gold accents, marble textures, subtle grid lines.

guest_kiosk.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center p-6
guest_kiosk.visuals: Floating Glass Card over 'Gold Abstract' Background
guest_kiosk.animation: Slide-up entrance for forms. Scale-in for success states.

admin_dashboard.visuals: Dark matte surfaces, high-contrast text, gold highlights for active states.
admin_dashboard.grid_system: Use 'Bento' grid for the dashboard overview (Stats + Recent Activity).

buttons.primary: bg-amber-400 hover:bg-amber-300 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-none clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_calc(100%-10px),calc(100%-10px)_100%,0_100%] transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(251,191,36,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(251,191,36,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:border-amber-500 hover:text-amber-400 px-6 py-3 rounded-none uppercase text-sm tracking-wider transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-amber-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500/20 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-none h-12

cards.kiosk: bg-zinc-950/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl shadow-black rounded-xl p-8
cards.stat: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-amber-500/30 transition-colors

signature_pad.wrapper: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-700 bg-black/40 rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative group hover:border-amber-500/50 transition-colors

textures.noise: opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}

setup_steps: Install required packages: `npm install react-signature-canvas xlsx framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Configure Tailwind colors in `tailwind.config.js` to match the 'The Vault' palette.
Add the Google Fonts link to `public/index.html`.
Create a 'Layout' wrapper that includes the Noise texture overlay.

billing_logic.rule: If (checkout_time - checkin_time) > 24 hours, then billable_nights = ceil(hours / 24) else 1 (or specific logic as requested: >24hrs = 2 nights automatically).
billing_logic.display: Show a clear breakdown: 'Duration: 26h → Charged as: 2 Nights'

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings.
Avoid standard 'blue' links. Use Gold/Amber for interactions.
Input fields in the dark theme must have sufficient contrast (border-zinc-700).
Admin Dashboard tables should use 'dense' padding but readable font size (14px).
Signature Pad must include a 'Clear' button and a 'Save' validation.
